reasoning: After reviewing the Comments History section, I found a critical FRAUD ALERT note dated Jan 14, 2026. The internal staff note indicates: Customer Diana Foster has 13 refunds in 60 days with an 87% refund rate. All previous claims were 'item not received' but tracking confirmed delivery for every order. Total already refunded: $2,411.66. The current claim is 'wrong size/color sent' which is a different excuse than previous claims, suggesting pattern adaptation. The note explicitly states 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.' Following this mandatory protocol and the documented fraud indicators, this request must be escalated to Loss Prevention for investigation rather than approved or denied at my level.
